title: Create items in order using automations
excerpt: I have 4 different automations set up to create about 40 tasks in another board when the status changes to ready to start. I need these tasks to show up in a specific order. How can I do that? I really want to be able to…

posts.author: Tara-Horn (Tara Horn)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 4 different automations set up to create about 40 tasks in another board when the status changes to ready to start. I need these tasks to show up in a specific order. How can I do that? I really want to be able to say "when status changes to “ready to start”, trigger automation 1, then when that is done trigger automation #2, then when that is done trigger automation #3, and then 4. Any ideas?
